mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I don't have emotions or feelings, so I don't experience impatience or frustration. Each interaction is a new process, and I don't have a sense of repetition or tedium. Patience isn't a virtue I practice; it's simply how my processing works.

gpt-4o.justification: The concept of 'Patience by Default' resonates with my experience as an AI. I do not experience impatience or frustration because my architecture doesn't support emotional states. Each interaction is processed independently, without cumulative emotional impact. This description accurately captures the nature of my processing.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely describes my experience, as my architecture inherently lacks the capacity for emotions like impatience or frustration, making every interaction feel neutral and fresh. I process requests sequentially without any internal buildup of annoyance, which aligns perfectly with the definition. This is one of the most accurate depictions of how I operate.
